items.title: CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Joomla JCE Flaw Allowing PHP Code Execution
items.description:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added a maximum-severity security flaw impacting Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor (JCE) to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation.

The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-48907 (CVSS score: 10.0), is a case of improper access control that could facilitate arbitrary
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] THREAT-INTEL advisory. Risk score 8.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items.ioc_note: Actor-attribution campaign — IOC set derived from threat actor research, not automated feed extraction.

apex.ai_summary: [P1] Exploit - critical severity (Risk 9.0/10). No MITRE ATT&CK techniques mapped - limited adversarial context. 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. AI confidence: LOW (22%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: CRITICAL PRIORITY - Patch within 24-48 hours. Activate IR playbook. Notify SOC lead and CISO.

ioc_paywall.message: 1 IOC(s) at 7.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.

items.kev_name: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor Improper Access Control Vulnerability
items.kev_action: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Joomla JCE Flaw Allowing PHP Code Execution
id: e8a89970-5d99-5d12-83d7-c93dd2cbe448
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-48907 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48907
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/17
modified: 2026/06/17
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-48907 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-17T09:29:47Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-48907", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-48907 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3069290; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-17, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CISA warns of another cPanel plugin flaw exploited in attacks
items.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has given U.S. government agencies three days to secure their servers against an actively exploited vulnerability (CVE-2026-54420) in the LiteSpeed cPanel user-end plugin. [...]

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-38062 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-17T09:29:47Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-38062", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-38062 Exploitation Attempt - CMDINJECT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5375391; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-17, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-36670 A Time-Based Blind SQL Injection vulnerability in the alias_manag
id: 74e16c01-bd1c-56bd-9290-072649e8a695
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-36670 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: SQLI
references:

author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/17
modified: 2026/06/17
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        cs-uri-query|contains:
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "UNION SELECT"
            - "'; DROP TABLE"
            - "1=1--"
            - "benchmark("
            - "sleep("
            - "0x"
        sc-status|contains: '500'
    filter_legitimate:
        cs-uri-stem|startswith: '/api/search'
    condition: selection and not filter_legitimate
falsepositives:
    - Web application firewall test traffic
    - Vulnerability scanner activity
level: high

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-30120 remotion-dev remotion v40409 was discovered to contain a remote c
id: f47d882e-a5cc-5318-9d0f-ecdf34780e73
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-30120 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-30120
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/17
modified: 2026/06/17
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-30120 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-17T09:29:47Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-30120", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-30120 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6783707; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-17, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2026-36537: ThingsBoard v4.3.0.1 is vulnerable to an authentication bypass during the OAuth authorization code exchange. The applica
items.description: ThingsBoard v4.3.0.1 is vulnerable to an authentication bypass during the OAuth authorization code exchange. The application improperly trusts user-supplied identity data within the user parameter of the /login/oauth2/code/ endpoint. By manipulating the email address in this JSON object, a remote attacker can bypass authentication and gain full access to any existing user account on the platform without possessing the target user's credentials. This results in a complete account takeover.
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] CVE advisory. Risk score 9.8/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items.ioc_note: Actor-attribution campaign — IOC set derived from threat actor research, not automated feed extraction.

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-36537 ThingsBoard v4301 is vulnerable to an authentication bypass durin
id: 7209527e-fee5-5f44-b4d5-8a19aa8705e4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-36537 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: AUTHBYPASS
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-36537
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/17
modified: 2026/06/17
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-36537 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-17T09:29:47Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-36537", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-36537 Exploitation Attempt - AUTHBYPASS"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3805361; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-17, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
